boards.name: Seeed XIAO nRF52840 Sense
boards.flash_method: UF2 drag-drop (double-tap reset to enter bootloader)
uf2_quirks: macOS fcopyfile error during UF2 drag is normal — flash succeeds; verify with Smoke Test 1
SoftDevice UF2 region starts at 0x26000 — do not flash raw .bin at offset 0x0000

known_pin_conflicts.warning: P0.27 is shared between I2C SCL and the on-board button/sensor pull-up. If WHO_AM_I returns EIO, check whether a session button or pull-up is fighting the SCL line.
P0.09 is reserved for NFC by default on nRF52840. Using it as GPIO requires NFC disabled in the SoftDevice config.
P0.10 is reserved for NFC by default on nRF52840. Using it as GPIO requires NFC disabled in the SoftDevice config.
P0.21 is the hardware reset pin. Do not assign to GPIO unless RESET is disabled via UICR.

boards.name: Seeed XIAO nRF52840
boards.flash_method: UF2 drag-drop (double-tap reset to enter bootloader)
uf2_quirks: macOS fcopyfile error during UF2 drag is normal — flash succeeds

known_pin_conflicts.warning: NFC pin — requires explicit disable to use as GPIO.
NFC pin — requires explicit disable to use as GPIO.
Hardware reset — do not use as GPIO without UICR change.
A0 is shared with the on-board PDM microphone power on some revisions.

boards.name: Nordic nRF52840 DK
uf2_quirks: No UF2 bootloader — requires J-Link or SWD programmer

known_pin_conflicts.warning: GPIO18/19 are USB D-/D+ — do not use as general GPIO if USB CDC is active.
GPIO18/19 are USB D-/D+ — do not use as general GPIO if USB CDC is active.
